name: HUD Widget
description: Custom HUD element with UI layout and script logic

scripts.description: HUD manager component that controls the custom widget

instructions:
CRITICAL: Use api_search to verify EVERY method you call. Never guess Enfusion API method names — they are non-standard.
1. Use api_search to look up HUD-related classes and verify available methods before writing code
2. Create a .layout file using layout_create for the widget visual design
3. Edit the HudComponent to load and manage the layout
4. Implement UpdateDisplay to show dynamic content
5. Attach the component to the player controller prefab
6. Test by joining a game and verifying the widget appears

codeExamples.title: Update a text widget every frame
codeExamples.description: Wire a TextWidget found in the loaded layout, then refresh it each frame. Widget.FindAnyWidget and ScriptComponent.SetEventMask(owner, mask) are both verified via api_search; TextWidget has no SetText — only SetTextFormat(text), also verified. EOnFrame + EntityEvent.FRAME matches the engine's own entity script_create template.
